do_if.value: @$undock and ((global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold.{$object}?) or ($object.order.id == 'DockAndTrain') or ($object.order.id == 'DockAndPilotExchange') or ($object.order.id == 'DockAndReturnHome') or ($object.order.id == 'DockAndWait' and (@$object.order.$callerid.id == 'DockAndTrain' or @$object.order.$callerid.id == 'DockAndPilotExchange' or @$object.order.$callerid.id == 'DockAndReturnHome')))

debug_text.text: '[GT ORDER PATCH] Preventing undock for GT dock wrapper order on ship: ' + $object.knownname + ' order=' + @$object.order.id
